description: Extract function name and parameter values from the raw prompt text using deterministic parsing

inputs.name: prompt_text
inputs.description: The raw input text containing the function call request with parameter values to extract

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: String representation of available function definitions including parameter schemas and types

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the top-level key and its parameters as a nested object. Example structure: {"solve_quadratic": {"a": 2, "b": 5, "c": 3}}

fields.function_name: dict - The function call with function name as key and parameters dict as value

workflow_spec.name: Parse Function Call from Text
workflow_spec.description: Parses raw text input to extract function call parameters and generate structured JSON function call with the function name as the top-level key
